summary: Tested Facette e-commerce admin panel iteration 7 features: attribute cleanup, bulk defaults, hidden attributes, and multi-color product creation. All backend tests passed (9/9). Frontend verification confirmed all requirements met.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test products for multi-color verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 7 features working correctly. Attribute cleanup removed 71 non-textile attributes (44 remain). Bulk defaults set Yaş Grubu=Yetişkin and Menşei=TR for all products. Hidden attributes (Beden, Renk, Web Color) are correctly hidden from Özellikler tab but exist in library. Multi-color product creation works via frontend grouping variants by color.

features_tested.cleanup_non_textile_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/attributes/cleanup-non-textile removes non-textile attributes (71 deleted, 44 remain)
features_tested.bulk_set_defaults_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/attributes/bulk-set-defaults sets Yaş Grubu=Yetişkin and Menşei=TR for all products
features_tested.attribute_count_44: PASS - GET /api/attributes returns exactly 44 attributes after cleanup
features_tested.hidden_attributes_in_library: PASS - Beden, Renk, Web Color exist in attribute library
features_tested.hidden_attributes_not_in_form: PASS - Beden, Renk, Web Color are NOT visible in Özellikler tab (managed via Varyantlar)
features_tested.default_attributes_in_new_product: PASS - New product form shows Yaş Grubu=Yetişkin and Menşei=TR pre-filled
features_tested.default_attributes_in_edit_product: PASS - Edit product form shows Yaş Grubu=Yetişkin and Menşei=TR with values
features_tested.existing_products_have_defaults: PASS - All existing products have Yaş Grubu=Yetişkin and Menşei=TR
features_tested.multi_color_product_creation: PASS - Creating products with multiple colors creates separate products with correct Web Color attribute
